use_cases: Triggering form submissions or actions in web applications
Creating primary, secondary, and destructive action buttons with consistent styling
Building icon-only buttons for toolbars or compact UI areas
Implementing accessible button interactions with focus and disabled states
Composing buttons with child elements using the asChild pattern
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Features accessible focus rings, disabled states, and standard hover interactions. Designed as an atomic, foundational UI primitive for any web application.
